hero_subtitle: SFTY provides regulators a secure supervisory layer that preserves audit trails, enforces access governance, and consolidates evidence for accountable digital asset oversight.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Audit readiness falters across disconnected systems
problem_description: Regulatory teams struggle to maintain defensible supervisory decisions when evidence and audit logs remain scattered across multiple sources. Without a unified audit framework, tracing decision history and preserving authority-grade evidence becomes slow and prone to gaps.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY centralizes evidence, decision logs, supervisory actions and multi-provider data into one secure operating layer to help regulators maintain complete, accessible and defensible audit trails.
workflow_title: From supervisory signals to evidence reports
workflow_description: SFTY structures supervisory signals into cases supported by linked evidence and documented decisions to produce defensible reports for regulatory review.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. A trust-grade audit layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides regulators with a unified supervisory layer that preserves evidence, records decisions, enforces access controls, and supports defensible audit trails in regulated environments.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated government environments requiring secure deployment, controlled access, defensible evidence logging and procurement-safe architecture from initial rollout.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how audit frameworks support supervisory decisions
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how evidence logging preserves case review history
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how access governance controls regulator workflows securely
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how multi-provider data integrates for audit readiness
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a secure supervisory layer connecting licensing, wallets, transactions, alerts and cases to help regulators manage digital asset oversight with structured workflows and market-level visibility.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support supervisory case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures supervisory signals into cases with entity linkage, decision logs, evidence collection and escalation paths to support clear, controlled and traceable workflows for investigation and reporting.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence within a secured environment, enabling auditability and review readiness compliant with institutional supervisory standards.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate into existing supervisory stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates outputs from multiple KYT, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and analytics providers to centralize data while supporting role-based access and governance within regulated environments.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing analytics or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects and organizes provider outputs into supervisory workflows without replacing existing analytics or compliance tools, enabling multi-provider orchestration for resilience and comparison.
final_title: Review audit frameworks supporting supervisory decisions
final_description: Explore how SFTY preserves evidence, enforces access control, and connects audit logs for defensible decision-making.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
